rows.requirement: Prefix scan over a topic path returns exactly the set of inserted paths sharing that prefix, in sorted order.
Exact required test-run command matches issue verbatim (go test ./engine/btree/... -run TestPrefixScan)
rows.test: TestPrefixScan (exact function name, verified via `go test ./engine/btree/... -run TestPrefixScan -v`)

rows.requirement: Prefix matching zero keys returns empty result, nil error (not an error)
Prefix matching keys split across multiple leaves via NextLeaf
rows.test: TestPrefixScanAcrossLeafBoundary (400 keys sharing one prefix, forcing multiple leaf splits, plus trailing differently-prefixed keys to confirm no spill-over)

rows.requirement: Prefix that is itself a complete key, plus other keys extending it
Empty-string prefix matches everything (implicit sanity, not explicitly required but a natural boundary of 'string prefix')

rows.test: N/A -- explicitly out of scope for 1.2.5 (belongs to 1.2.6 per issue's actual checklist; see requirement.md)
